Interface IBaseNetworkAssociation2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a base network association.

[Guid("366148E8-8C89-4125-8E6E-568BC7395BE1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBaseNetworkAssociation2 : IBaseNetworkAssociation
